insert.foreach:
INSERT INTO ops_delivery_estimate_result
association_key, model_no, quantity_level, qty, dept_no, customer_no,
end_user ,
ppl_no ,
project_no ,
group_customer_no ,

mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ops_delivery_estimate_result ( association_key, model_no, quantity_level, qty, dept_no, customer_no, end_user , ppl_no , project_no , group_customer_no , sales_info_no , delivery_days, gather_warehouse_code, instock, create_user, create_time, allot_result) values
( #{item.associationKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.quantityLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pplNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.deliveryDays,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.gatherWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.instock,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.allotResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert.foreach:
INSERT INTO error_msg_notice
result_key, model_no, key_msg,
#{item.resultKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.keyMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
